name: download_translation
description: Download the translated version of a completed document. Returns the translated file in the same format as the original uploaded document. The document should be in 'completed' status for a full translation, but partial downloads are also supported for documents still in progress.

parameters.name: documentIds
parameters.description: Array of document IDs to export. Multiple documents can be exported at once. Passed as repeated query parameters.

body._note: Returns the task ID for async export. Poll the task status endpoint until ready, then download.
